name: exerly-fitness
description: Exerly Fitness monorepo with API, web dashboard, and iOS app

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.local: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run local:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix apps/api && npm install --prefix apps/web
